name: Unofficial source used
description: A conclusion relies on a source that is not controlled by the vendor.
recommended_system_fix: Require official evidence for high-impact fields and label secondary evidence.

name: Credential access inferred without evidence
description: Credential availability was classified without credential-registration evidence.
recommended_system_fix: Research credential creation separately and escalate unsupported classifications.

name: API existence confused with self-serve access
description: Public API documentation was treated as proof that credentials are obtainable.
recommended_system_fix: Require distinct evidence for API existence and credential access.

name: OAuth support confused with OAuth client registration
description: OAuth support was treated as proof that developers can register clients.
recommended_system_fix: Require evidence describing OAuth app or client registration.

name: Admin requirement missed
description: A workspace or organization administrator requirement was omitted.
recommended_system_fix: Search official setup guides for required roles and permissions.

name: Paid plan requirement missed
description: A paid tier required for API or credential access was omitted.
recommended_system_fix: Cross-check API documentation against current official pricing.

name: Partner or sales gate missed
description: Partner enrollment, vendor approval, or sales contact was not recorded.
recommended_system_fix: Search partner and integration publication requirements separately.

name: Old or deprecated documentation
description: A conclusion relies on superseded documentation.
recommended_system_fix: Capture update dates and check official deprecation notices.

name: Official MCP confused with community MCP
description: A community MCP server was labeled as vendor-official.
recommended_system_fix: Verify ownership using vendor domains or official GitHub organizations.

name: None found converted to not supported
description: Failure to find evidence was converted into an explicit non-support claim.
recommended_system_fix: Keep none_found and not_supported distinct and require explicit proof.

name: Pricing and documentation conflict
description: Official pricing and developer documentation imply incompatible access conditions.
recommended_system_fix: Preserve both sources and route the contradiction to human review.

name: Login-gated evidence
description: A source cannot be independently reviewed without an authenticated account.
recommended_system_fix: Flag access restrictions and seek a reviewable official source.

name: Insufficient API breadth analysis
description: API breadth was classified without reviewing important resources and operations.
recommended_system_fix: Record read, write, bulk, webhook, and resource coverage independently.

name: Researcher-verifier agreement without evidence
description: Matching outputs were accepted despite absent or inadequate supporting evidence.
recommended_system_fix: Run evidence sufficiency checks independently of value agreement.

name: Unsupported buildability verdict
description: The final buildability verdict introduces a conclusion not supported by prior fields.
recommended_system_fix: Derive reasoning only from evidence-backed structured fields.
